action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 << 'PYEOF'
# Simple sed-like fix: remove the insertInto lines
content = open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp').read()
# Remove endBb->insertInto(mCurFunc);
content = content.replace('\n  endBb->insertInto(mCurFunc);\n', '\n')
open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'w').write(content)
print("Removed insertInto calls")
PYEOF
